ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Department offering the course */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the course is offered */,
  "term" TEXT /* Term the course is offered (e.g., Fall, Spring) */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject area of the course (e.g., AAS, LLS) */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Course number */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "credit_hours" REAL /* Number of credit hours for the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* List of prerequisites for the course */,
  "course_format" TEXT /* Format of the course (e.g., online, in-person, hybrid) */,
  "credits_min" REAL /* Minimum credits a student can earn for the course */,
  "credits_max" REAL /* Maximum credits a student can earn for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "dept_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the department */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "dept_description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the department belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the section belongs to */,
  "section_info" TEXT /* Information about the section (e.g., instructor, meeting time) */,
  "schedule_info" TEXT /* Schedule information for the section */,
  "section_type" TEXT /* Type of section (e.g., lecture, discussion, lab) */,
  "enrollment_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the section */,
  "waitlist_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed on the waitlist */,
  "section_status" TEXT /* Status of the section (e.g., open, closed, waitlist) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_sections_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "degree_attributes" (
  "attr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each degree attribute */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the attribute belongs to */,
  "attr_name" TEXT /* Name of the degree attribute */,
  "attr_description" TEXT /* Description of the degree attribute */,
  "attr_category" TEXT /* Category of the degree attribute (e.g., General Education, Cultural Studies) */,
  "attr_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the degree attribute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_degree_attributes_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "student_type" TEXT /* Type of student (e.g., undergraduate, graduate) */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student's advisor */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected graduation date of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course enrolled */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section enrolled */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., enrolled, dropped, waitlisted) */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Final grade earned by the student in the course */,
  "grade_date" TEXT /* Date the grade was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES course_sections ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the instructor */,
  "instructor_type" TEXT /* Type of instructor (e.g., professor, teaching assistant) */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_instructors" (
  "course_instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course-instructor assignment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the instructor in the course (e.g., instructor, teaching assistant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
